InvitationCreatedResponse.description: Token invite creation response; token is always set.

product_snapshot.title: Product Snapshot
product_snapshot.description: Product data at purchase time, e.g. name, category_id, organization_id, price.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Sign-up, JWT login (`/users/login`) and current user profile (`/users/me`).

tags.name: products
tags.description: Product catalog CRUD protected with JWT Bearer **or** organization `X-API-Key`. JWT requests must also send `X-Organization-Id` for a membership the user belongs to.

tags.name: organizations
tags.description: Organizations and per-organization API keys (JWT Bearer required).
